section_miscategorizations.text: He reports taking Tylenol for mild pain and adjusting activity levels as needed.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly placed as patient-reported current medication use and self-management behavior.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is otherwise stable on examination.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an overall exam finding/summary of objective status and is acceptable in the Objective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: He has no acute findings requiring immediate attention.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an interpretive clinical judgment about acuity and belongs in the Assessment.
